scripts.check: node --check src/botWsClient.js && node --check src/processIncomingRawFile.js && node --check src/feishuClient.js
scripts.test:config: node -e "const { assertConfig, config } = require('./src/config'); assertConfig(); console.log({ baseUrl: config.baseUrl, tenantDomain: config.tenantDomain, hasAppId: Boolean(config.appId), hasSecret: Boolean(config.appSecret) });"
